overall_summary: Development activity on May 16 concentrated on foundational hardening, including cross-platform vault integration and critical bug fixes for ElizaOS. Community discussions highlighted new partnership curiosity and the introduction of an AI agent escrow protocol on Base Mainnet.
key_facts: Dexploarer merged PR #7197 implementing @elizaos/vault, a cross-platform secrets management system featuring AES-256-GCM encryption and OS keychain integration.
The AI agent escrow protocol was deployed on Base Mainnet, utilizing a 'Pay or Burn' mechanism to resolve agent disputes without human arbitration.
Zadayos announced the Eliza-1 model series based on Qwen3.5, ranging from 0.6B mobile-optimized models to 27B variants with 1M token context windows.
Developer ReaWorks introduced an auditable escrow primitive for AI agents on Base to manage payment and settlement flows without embedding trust logic in the runtime.
PR #7230 was merged to skip OS keychain services on headless Linux to prevent process-level segfaults during agent boot.
PR #7375 migrated the @elizaos/plugin-slack into the monorepo, adding 11 actions and 3 providers for Slack integration.
PR #7245 resolved a race condition where duplicate Telegraf instances were causing silent message loss in Telegram bot integrations.
Integration with the GODL protocol on Solana was confirmed as compatible via the skill.md format by maintainer odilitime.
open_questions: What is the current development focus of Eliza v3: infrastructure stabilization or public release of the autonomous agent workflow stack?
What is the integration status of the new identity/AgentID system in the Eliza v3 architecture?
What are the specific details and context regarding the partnership announcement mentioned by ivgamer3467 on May 15?

new_issues_prs.title: feat(vault): @elizaos/vault — cross-platform secrets vault + Settings UI integration
new_issues_prs.author: Dexploarer
new_issues_prs.significance: Adds secure encryption-at-rest for sensitive plugin data using OS keychains.

new_issues_prs.title: feat(slack): migrate plugin-slack into the monorepo
new_issues_prs.author: 2-A-M
new_issues_prs.significance: Consolidates Slack connectivity into the main repository with expanded actions.

new_issues_prs.title: telegram: milady wrapper + @elizaos/plugin-telegram both poll the same bot — race causes silent message loss
new_issues_prs.author: Sw4pIO
new_issues_prs.significance: Fixes a critical bug where 50% of Telegram messages were being dropped due to duplicate consumers.

overall_focus.claim: The project is undergoing foundational hardening, focusing on stabilizing core reliability and ensuring ESM-first architecture alignment across the plugin ecosystem.

discord_updates.summary: Light activity focused on greetings and a brief confirmation of active work on 'eliza OZ'. Curiosity was expressed regarding a significant partnership announcement.
Introduction of a simple escrow primitive for AI agents on Base, designed to maintain auditable incentive structures while avoiding trust logic in the runtime.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users reported high API credit consumption with Neynar (300 credits/hour) despite polling overrides, leading to a community suggestion to move toward webhooks.

strategic_insights.insight: The introduction of @elizaos/vault signals a move toward enterprise-grade security by removing plaintext secrets from local configuration files.
implications_or_questions: Will all third-party plugins be required to migrate to the vault system for future compatibility?

strategic_insights.insight: Multiple independent proponents (GODL on Solana, Escrow Protocol on Base) are simultaneously pushing for on-chain economic primitives for agents.
implications_or_questions: Should ElizaOS define a standard 'Payment Service' interface to unify these multi-chain escrow and mining integrations?

market_analysis.observation: Introduction of the Eliza-1 model series using Qwen3.5 hardware optimized for H200.
market_analysis.relevance: Positions the project to provide high-performance, specialized LLMs tailored for agentic tasks like mobile offline deployment.
